title: Historical Context
description: Who was writing, who they were writing to, and the world they shared. Surface the historical setting of every passage as you read.

title: Early Church View
description: How the earliest readers — the church fathers, the councils, the worshipping communities — understood the passage you're reading.

title: Academic Discourse
description: Where today's scholars stand. The major interpretive debates, the textual questions, and the major positions — without the jargon.

title: Cross-References
description: See how Scripture interprets Scripture. Linked passages from across the canon that echo, quote, or expand on what you're reading.

title: Ask Bible Questions
description: Ask a question about any verse, doctrine, or theme — and get an answer grounded in real citations from the text and scholarly sources.

title: 29 translations
description: Twenty-one English translations — KJV, NIV, NASB (1995 & 2020), Berean Standard, Amplified, Geneva, ASV, Literal Standard, Free Bible, Passion Translation, and more — plus eight Spanish translations.

title: Specialized editions
description: Catholic Public Domain Version, Orthodox Jewish Bible, World Messianic Bible (both editions), and Plain English Version for Aboriginal readers — read with the canon and the cadence that's home to you.

title: Spanish translations
description: La Biblia de las Américas, Nueva Biblia de las Américas, Nueva Versión Internacional (2015 & 2025), Reina-Valera Antigua, Versión Biblia Libre, Palabra de Dios para Ti, and Gloss Spanish. Switch the interface language anytime.

title: Ten Reading Themes
description: Light, Cream, Light Gray, Gray, Light Blue, Sepia, Sand, Olive, Dusk, and Dark. Pick the one that suits the time of day and the room you're in.

title: Five Typefaces
description: Read in your typeface of choice — system sans-serif, Georgia, Times New Roman, Palatino, Verdana, or Tahoma.

title: Adjustable Type
description: Set font size and line spacing to your liking. Designed for long sessions and aging eyes alike.

title: Verse of the Day
description: A daily verse delivered to your phone — with the context that makes it land. Receive it by push notification or email.

title: Weekly Context Insights
description: A themed deep-dive each week that surfaces the cultural and historical layers behind the passages you're reading. Choose the day it arrives.

title: Customizable Delivery
description: Push notifications, email, or both. Daily or weekly. Choose what arrives and when so the app fits around your rhythm, not the other way around.

title: Save Verses
description: Keep a personal library of passages you keep returning to. One tap to save; one tap to find again.

title: Notes & Highlights
description: Highlight the words that stop you and jot the thoughts they spark. With Premium, everything syncs across every device you read on.

title: Copy & Quote
description: Copy any verse with one tap, ready to paste into a message, a note, or a sermon.

title: Beautiful Verse Cards
description: Turn what speaks to you into a shareable image — square for Instagram, 3:4 for Stories, 16:9 for everything else.

title: Custom Backgrounds
description: Adjust plate opacity and background blur to make each verse card your own before you share it.

title: Share Anywhere
description: Send a verse card straight to a friend, post it to a feed, or save it to your camera roll.

title: Sync Across Devices
description: Premium keeps your notes, highlights, and saved verses in step on every device you read on. Pick up where you left off.

title: More Daily Generations
description: Ask more questions, generate more verse cards, and explore more context with raised daily limits.

title: Your Name, Only
description: We only use your name to personalize your experience — no ad targeting, no data resale. You can update it anytime in Settings.

title: Sign In Your Way
description: Continue with Google, Apple, or email. No password resets, no account juggling.
